title: Is it possible to duplicate a workspace
excerpt: It’s possible to duplicate a board, but I can’t find an option to duplicate a workspace. Is this possible or not?

posts.author: Stonefield (Bjorn Steenveld)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s possible to duplicate a board, but I can’t find an option to duplicate a workspace. Is this possible or not?

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml: No, it is not. You may want to vote for the suggestion to add this feature: Duplicating an entire Workspace, keeping all Boards & Automations
